ab: a ku kama na i qinaljan a cinunan.
ch: 我的爸爸是部落的獵人。
en: My dad is a hunter of the tribe.

ab: ka qaqunuan na ken, ti kama kati djisan nu itua qezemezemetj vaik a ljesasaw, kemacu ta tjakit kata kuwang.
ch: 我小的時候，爸爸和叔叔會在晚上出門，帶著獵刀和獵槍。
en: When I was little, my dad and uncle would go out at night with hunting knives and guns.

ab: numaljia, mangetjez tiamadju a na kemacu ta djinameq a sacemel.
ch: 天亮時，他們就會帶著獵到的獵物回來。
en: At daybreak, they returned with their prey.

ab: nucuayanga vavuy, nucuayanga lava, nuaya izua padjavatan uta.
ch: 有時候是山豬、有時候是飛鼠，偶爾也會有雉雞。
en: Sometimes it was a boar, sometimes a flying squirrel, and occasionally a pheasant.

ab: aza sacemel qaluqaluten niamadju i siljitaladj tua qinaljan a paljing, pasleva tua sikataqaljan.
ch: 他們會在村口將獵物分好，分享給族人。
en: They would divide the prey at the entrance of the village and share it with the tribe.

ab: sakamaya ru qemevaw a ken tja kama, sa kiciul a qemaljup kati kama.
ch: 我每次都會吵著爸爸，要跟著爸爸去打獵。
en: Every time I quarreled with my father, I wanted to go hunting with my father.

ab: aya ti kama nu meqaca sun, ku su kacuaw anga.
ch: 爸爸說等我長大了，他再帶我一起去。
en: Dad said that he would take me with me when I grew up.

ab: a i qinaljan a uqaljaqaljay macaqu a pudringay djemekep ta sacemel, tiamadju saigu cukulu ta veceqel a dringay kata siqezetjan tua qaciljay a dringay.
ch: 部落的男人也會用陷阱抓獵物，他們會製作套索陷阱和石壓式陷阱。
en: The men of the tribe also trap their prey, making lasso traps and rock traps.

ab: a ku kama saigu a cukulu ta veceqel a dringay, aya ti kama, aicu uli sidringay ta padjavatan, tja kigaljuing a ljemengljeng za na sacemel a djekap, za dringay tja pizuaing ta na sacemel vinaikan a djaljan.
ch: 我的爸爸很會製作套索陷阱，爸爸說，這是用來捕抓雉雞的，我們要仔細觀察獵物的腳印，陷阱要放在獵物走的路上。
en: My dad is very good at making lasso traps. Dad said that this is used to catch pheasants. We have to carefully observe the footprints of the prey, and the traps should be placed on the path of the prey.

ab: ulja dikilu a kilimu kata ramaljeng maciul a qemaljup, nu ljemita qadaw kicaquan a cukulu ta dringay, aza u dringay uli palamu anga paqulid a maqati djemameq tua sacemel.
ch: 為了可以趕快和大人一起去打獵，我每天練習製作陷阱，很快地我的陷阱就真的可以抓到獵物了。
en: In order to go hunting with adults as soon as possible, I practiced making traps every day, and soon my traps can really catch prey.

ab: ti ka pacunan na ken qivu tjanuaken, nu tjaivililj tjara masan saiguan sun a cinunan.
ch: 爸爸看到後對我說,我以後一定會是很厲害的獵人。
en: Dad saw it and told me that I will be a very good hunter in the future.

ab: tucu meqacanga ken, ku sevaljeng a u panaq kata vakela, kiciul ta ku kama vaik a qemaljup.
ch: 現在我長大了，我背起我的弓和，跟著爸爸一起去打獵。
en: Now that I have grown up, I carry my bow and arrows and go hunting with my father.

ab: ka sema qinaljan, aza nia djinameq a sacemel uli pasleva tua sikataqaljan.
ch: 回村時，將獵到的獵物和族人們分享。
en: When returning to the village, share the hunted prey with the tribe.

ab: aya ti kama, masalu aravac tana qemati a sinipagaugaw. pavayan itjen tu liaw ta sacemel a manguaqan.
ch: 爸爸說，要感謝祖靈賜福，讓我們有很多獵物收穫。
en: Dad said, we want to thank the ancestors for their blessings, so that we have a lot of prey to harvest.
